heading: Appointments of representatives and panel members under Convention on the Settlement of Investment Disputes
label: 1650 Appointments of representatives and panel members under Convention on the Settlement of Investment Disputes
text: The President may make such appointments of representatives and panel members as may be provided for under the convention.
notes: References in TextThe convention, referred to in text, is the Convention on the Settlement of Investment Disputes Between States and Nationals of Other States which was signed on , approved by the Senate on , and ratified by the President on .Aug. 27, 1965May 16, 1966June 1, 1966
Short Title, , , provided:Pub. L. 89–532, § 180 Stat. 344Aug. 11, 1966“That this Act [enacting this chapter] may be cited as the ‘Convention on the Settlement of Investment Disputes Act of 1966’.”
amendments: Short Title, , , provided:Pub. L. 89–532, § 180 Stat. 344Aug. 11, 1966“That this Act [enacting this chapter] may be cited as the ‘Convention on the Settlement of Investment Disputes Act of 1966’.”
